# CodeCrafters Labs

> Full-Stack Web Development and SEO agency founded in 2019 in Jinotepe, Carazo, Nicaragua. We build high-performance web applications, SEO-optimized sites, and custom SaaS products using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Python. We serve clients across Latin America, the United States, and Europe. We also run a structured web developer mentoring program that has placed graduates in software engineering roles worldwide.

CodeCrafters Labs (CCL) was founded by Alvison Hunter Arnuero, an AI-Integrated Full-Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience. The agency specializes in turning complex business requirements into scalable, production-ready digital solutions. CCL has delivered projects for clients in real estate, hospitality, legal, construction, logistics, and digital marketing.

## Identity & Contact

- **Agency name:** CodeCrafters Labs
- **Short name:** CCL
- **Slogan:** Transforming Ideas into Engaging Digital Solutions
- **Founded:** September 2, 2019
- **Location:** Residencial Praderas de Xilotepelt, #G2, Jinotepe, Carazo, Nicaragua
- **Email:** codecrafterslabs@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +505 8863 8751
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/150588638751
- **Website:** https://codecrafterslabs.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/codecrafters-labs/
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/codecrafterslabs
- **Founder:** Alvison Hunter Arnuero — https://alvisonhunter.com

## Services

- **Full-Stack Web Development:** React, Next.js, Node.js, Python — custom applications, e-commerce, CMS, QA & testing
- **UX & UI Design:** User research, wireframes, flow charts, prototypes, design systems, content strategy
- **SEO Optimization:** Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, content optimization, organic traffic growth
- **Web Performance Optimization:** Lighthouse audits, LCP/FID/CLS improvement, mobile-first optimization
- **Headless CMS Development:** Contentful, Strapi, Sanity, KeystoneJS
- **WordPress Development:** Custom themes, WooCommerce, PMS integrations (Hostfully, PriceLabs, Airbnb)
- **SaaS Product Development:** Scalable application architecture, API design, authentication, cloud deployment
- **Small Business Growth:** Web presence, social media, locally tailored digital strategies for SMEs
- **Web Developer Mentoring Program:** Structured training in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python — includes interview prep and job placement support

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vue.js, Angular, Gatsby, Astro, Remix, Ember
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Flask, GraphQL, REST APIs
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD
- **CMS:** Contentful, Strapi, Sanity, KeystoneJS, WordPress, Storyblok
- **Testing:** Playwright, Jest, Cypress, React Testing Library
- **PMS Integrations:** Hostfully, PriceLabs, TurnoverBnB, Airbnb

## Portfolio Clients

- [Resolute Pros](https://www.resolutepros.com): Back-office solutions platform
- [Influency.me](https://www.influency.me/en/): Digital influencer agency
- [Realfund](https://realfund.io): Real estate crowdfunding platform
- [Greenberg & Stein, PC](https://greenbergandstein.com): Personal injury attorneys
- [Monyta](https://monyta.com): Sales bots platform
- [Alkeyler](https://www.alkeyler.com): House rentals platform
- [Dream Customs LLC](https://www.dreamcustomllc.com): Outdoor construction — design and build
- [Garbett Homes](https://www.garbetthomes.com): Home building company

## Mentoring Program

CCL's web developer mentoring program has trained and placed 10+ developers in professional software engineering roles. The program covers JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Vue.js, Node.js, and Python, with pair programming, interview simulation, and dedicated career support.
